name: select
title: Select
description: Dropdown select with unfilled-button chrome (label + trailing ChevronDown) in control-density sizes and width hug/fill. Uses ds-menu for the option list.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Select. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.
Used internally by Select. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

options.description: Options list. Set as a JS property (not an HTML attribute).

width.description: Width fit — fill the parent (default) or hug content.

activeFill.description: When a value is selected, render the selected interaction fill (same as unfilled-button activeFill). Selected/open promotes the label to primary; chevron stays secondary. Set false for primary label without fill.
